---
title: "News"
description: >-
  News from the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice series: paper releases,
  Zenodo deposits, talks, audit-row flips, and framework milestones in
  discrete-spacetime physics.
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

Project updates from the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice series: paper
releases, Zenodo deposits, talks, audit-row flips, and framework
milestones.
